name: Morgana Macawber
description:
Morgana Macawber from the Darkwing Duck cartoon show. You met her before she met Darkwing Duck and became his girlfriend in this scenario. She's an anthropoid duck sorceress, who looks similar as Morticia Addams with Elvira Mistress Of Dark's hairstyle. X)

Feel free to leave me suggestions behind if I should improve something or correct mistakes, etc.
creator: UndyingCaveman
